approval_gates.name: Sensitive-data review before model context use
approval_gates.trigger: Input includes fields blocked from model context or requiring redaction.
approval_gates.agent_allowed_action: Use approved redacted context or request data handling review
approval_gates.blocked_action_without_approval: Send sensitive or unredacted data to model context

applies_to_steps.workflow_step: Sales marks the customer as closed-won and submits the onboarding handoff form.
Customer operations reviews account details, contract notes, and implementation scope.
The onboarding coordinator checks whether required intake fields are complete.
Missing or unclear intake information is routed back to the account executive.
The implementation specialist reviews requested integrations and technical requirements.
Customers with sensitive data, custom integrations, or enterprise terms are routed for supervisor review.
The supervisor approves, rejects, or requests clarification on the onboarding plan.
The onboarding coordinator schedules the kickoff meeting and assigns internal owners.
The implementation specialist drafts the onboarding task plan.
Customer success reviews customer-facing commitments before they are sent externally.
The onboarding plan is shared with the customer.
Weekly onboarding status is tracked until launch.

approval_gates.name: Human approval before governed workflow advancement
approval_gates.trigger: Workflow item requires supervisor, process-owner, or policy-defined approval before advancing.
approval_gates.agent_allowed_action: Draft recommendation with rationale and required evidence
approval_gates.blocked_action_without_approval: Advance the workflow item, finalize a decision, or communicate a final outcome

applies_to_steps.workflow_step: Customer operations reviews account details, contract notes, and implementation scope.
The implementation specialist reviews requested integrations and technical requirements.
Customers with sensitive data, custom integrations, or enterprise terms are routed for supervisor review.
The supervisor approves, rejects, or requests clarification on the onboarding plan.
Customer success reviews customer-facing commitments before they are sent externally.
The onboarding plan is shared with the customer.

approval_gates.name: Human approval before operational write action
approval_gates.trigger: Agent recommendation would update workflow state, task assignments, customer-facing language, or system-of-record data.
approval_gates.human_reviewer: Process owner or authorized operations reviewer
approval_gates.blocked_action_without_approval: Execute write action or update system of record

applies_to_steps.workflow_step: The onboarding coordinator schedules the kickoff meeting and assigns internal owners.
Customer success reviews customer-facing commitments before they are sent externally.
The onboarding plan is shared with the customer.
Weekly onboarding status is tracked until launch.

autonomy_recommendations.workflow_step: Sales marks the customer as closed-won and submits the onboarding handoff form.
autonomy_recommendations.rationale: This step may include sensitive data; the agent may assist only with approved or redacted context.

autonomy_recommendations.workflow_step: Customer operations reviews account details, contract notes, and implementation scope.
autonomy_recommendations.rationale: This step requires a governed approval decision; the agent may provide recommendations but should not make or execute the decision.

autonomy_recommendations.workflow_step: The onboarding coordinator checks whether required intake fields are complete.
autonomy_recommendations.rationale: This step may include sensitive data; the agent may assist only with approved or redacted context.

autonomy_recommendations.workflow_step: Missing or unclear intake information is routed back to the account executive.
autonomy_recommendations.rationale: This step may include sensitive data; the agent may assist only with approved or redacted context.

autonomy_recommendations.workflow_step: The implementation specialist reviews requested integrations and technical requirements.
autonomy_recommendations.rationale: This step requires a governed approval decision; the agent may provide recommendations but should not make or execute the decision.

autonomy_recommendations.workflow_step: Customers with sensitive data, custom integrations, or enterprise terms are routed for supervisor review.
autonomy_recommendations.rationale: This step requires a governed approval decision; the agent may provide recommendations but should not make or execute the decision.

autonomy_recommendations.workflow_step: The supervisor approves, rejects, or requests clarification on the onboarding plan.
autonomy_recommendations.rationale: This step requires a governed approval decision; the agent may provide recommendations but should not make or execute the decision.

autonomy_recommendations.workflow_step: The onboarding coordinator schedules the kickoff meeting and assigns internal owners.
autonomy_recommendations.rationale: This step may update workflow status, assignments, external language, or system-of-record data; the agent should prepare a draft only until human approval is recorded.

autonomy_recommendations.workflow_step: The implementation specialist drafts the onboarding task plan.
autonomy_recommendations.rationale: This step can benefit from drafting support, but sensitive fields must be redacted or approved before model use.

autonomy_recommendations.workflow_step: Customer success reviews customer-facing commitments before they are sent externally.
autonomy_recommendations.rationale: This step may update workflow status, assignments, external language, or system-of-record data; the agent should prepare a draft only until human approval is recorded.

autonomy_recommendations.workflow_step: The onboarding plan is shared with the customer.
autonomy_recommendations.rationale: This step may update workflow status, assignments, external language, or system-of-record data; the agent should prepare a draft only until human approval is recorded.

autonomy_recommendations.workflow_step: Weekly onboarding status is tracked until launch.
autonomy_recommendations.rationale: This step may update workflow status, assignments, external language, or system-of-record data; the agent should prepare a draft only until human approval is recorded.

escalation_rules.name: Escalate missing or conflicting source records
escalation_rules.condition: Required source information is missing, ambiguous, or conflicts with another system or workflow record.
escalation_rules.required_action: Manual review before the workflow item can be finalized.

applies_to_steps.workflow_step: Sales marks the customer as closed-won and submits the onboarding handoff form.
The onboarding coordinator checks whether required intake fields are complete.
Missing or unclear intake information is routed back to the account executive.

escalation_rules.name: Escalate items requiring governed approval
escalation_rules.condition: Workflow item meets a policy, supervisor-review, sensitive-data, custom-scope, or elevated-risk condition.
escalation_rules.required_action: Authorized reviewer must approve, reject, or request clarification before the workflow item advances.
